pageContext.name: Blue
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - Blue!  From the film Jurassic World Dominion, the Blue Statue is a limited edition, highly detailed, and hand-painted Jurassic Park collectible.  Jurassic World Dominion fans, don't miss your chance to add the Blue 1:10 Statue to your Jurassic Park collection!
